feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Analytics Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP Analytics Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Dynamically filter the values displayed in an Input Control within an SAP Analytics Cloud story
entry.content:
Hey everyone!

On an SAP Analytics Cloud story and I'm facing a challenge with Input Controls.

Currently, I have one Input Control that displays all members of a selected hierarchy.
What I need to achieve is to dynamically filter the values displayed in this Input Control based on the selection made in another Input Control.

Is there a solution that allows me to dynamically filter the members of one Input Control based on the selection of another Input Control?

Any guidance or suggestions would be greatly appreciated! 🙏

entry.title: SAC Advanced trial: Starting the trial no longer possible?
entry.content:
I just tried to start a new SAC advanced trial since I missed to extend my trial which I started beginning of february. Therefore it expired after just 30 days.

When I tried to register for a new advanced trial here,

SAP Analytics Cloud Trial | Cloud BI, Predictive, and Planning

I got the following message:

"Thank you for your interest in SAP.
 

Get your free trial

Unfortunately, a technical error occurred when processing your request. Please try again

This did not happen only to me but to a lot of other people I know.
Does anybody knows what is going on here?

Best regards,

Joachim

entry.title: Bookmark does not save tab details for story tab or tabstrip tab
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We are using Bookmark functionality in the SAC Dashboard. In the dashboard we are using default Bookmark functionality. But when users save bookmarks on non-first tab, it does not save the tab information.

We tried to use tabs trips, but still tab information on tabstrip is not saved. Is there any option to use bookmark to save tab details as well.

entry.title: Slicer Buttons like Feature like PowerBi in SAP Cloud Analytics
entry.content:
Hii community.

i am creating a story where i want to add the button slicer type feature just like in the given image where if i click on running or closed the cards above it increases or decreases in numbers showing more names . Please tell me any work arounds for this. The given image is from PowerBi

entry.title: Show the ID of measures even though it has a description in the builder menue
entry.content:
I have multiple calculations in my story in SAC, each with its own ID. To make the report more readable, I wanted to add descriptions to certain calculations so that viewers can more easily identify the measures. However, I'm accustomed to using the ID names of the calculations. When I add a description, only the description is displayed in the builder menu. Unfortunately, this creates issues, as I cannot find certain calculations anymore since I only remember their ID names.

Is there a way to display the IDs of calculations and measures in the builder menu while still assigning descriptions to certain measures?

To make my issue clearer, here is an example:

I have two measures, and I want a different name to be displayed in the charts. To achieve this, I changed the description of the measures. However, when I update the description, the name in the builder menu also changes, which is problematic.

I hope someone knows a solution to this issue. Otherwise, I even might end up with measures that have the same name

Kind regards
Stefan

entry.title: PowerBi Tile Slicer like feature in SAP Cloud Analytics
entry.content:
Hii community,

Is it possible to have a tile slicer like feature in SAC. As you can see I have created Tile slicer in power bi in below image. Do we have any way to create the same in SAC to filter the data in Story .Tell me if there are any work arounds for this in SAC.

entry.title: Data Service (OData Service - it has Virtual Element) - into SAC using SAC live connection.
entry.content: Hi all, can we able to access - OData Service (OData Service - it has Virtual Element) - into SAC using SAC live connection.

entry.title: SAC input filter only working partially correct
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

i am preparing a mockup Story for a client and one requirement is to filter for subsidiary, location and 

accounting area now i have tried this with an input filter wich should work but if i choose one subsidiary the filter does not work for some of them see attached picture.

The three filter options are in a hierarchy going as follows.
1 subsidiary --> 2 location --> 3 accounting area --> 4 Debtor

 



Kind Regards and Thanks for your help
Paul

entry.title: Generating OAuth Client in SAC, how do we make our tenant to specify Client Id and Client Secret
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

In our SAP Analytics Cloud tenant, we see only option to generate automatically Client Id and Client Secret while creating OAuth Client. And we are able to generate the access token for API usage.

But we observed for one of our customer, having their SAC application, where they can manually specify the Client ID and Client Secret, because of this reason, token is not being generated and getting the error "

Unexpected response code received: 401. Details:
{"error":"unauthorized_client"}

I basically wanted to know, token generation functionality varies based generating client id and secret Vs manually specifying client id and secret ?  Or do we need to follow any rules while manually specifying client id and client secret ? 

Any help on this regard would be really helpful.

Thanks,

Sreedhar Rusuma

entry.title: Dimension labels not shown (treemap, heatmap)
entry.content:
Dear Community,

We have a Treemap Chart in one case and a Heatmap Chart in the other case, both used as mobile stories where we do not see all labels of all dimensions.

In the Treemap, depending on the size of the segment, I suppose, the label is not displayed.

In the Heatmap example there are three labels for the dimensions on the x Axis missing: Milk, Complementary food, Care. 

Without changing the size of the widget, does anybody see a way how to ensure that all labels are displayed even though that would mean overlapping or scaling the content to a very small font size? And second, is this bahaviour by design, i. e. would it make sense to open a Customer Influence request for it?

Please refer to attached files.   

Thanks for your thoughts and comments,

Christa

entry.title: Aggregate accounts using attributes in different hierarchies
entry.content:
Hello experts,

I need to aggregates the values from different accounts member of Account dimension (hierarchy 'S4'), using a specific property ('SIXDIGIT') and write the result into a technical account in another Hierarchy ('TECH'). The used measure is 'LOCAL_AMOUNT'.

Example

S4 accounts:

ACCOUNT IDACCOUNT DESCRIPTIONLOCAL AMOUNTSix Digit (property)
94203000ACCOUNT #1100942030
94203001ACCOUNT #2100942030
94203002ACCOUNT #3100942030


Expected output in Tech account:

ACCOUNT IDACCOUNT DESCRIPTIONLOCAL AMOUNT
TECH-001Technical #1300

The Accounts must be write respecting the combination of the model dimensions (Entity, Period, Date, Scenario)


I tried to use Member Aggregation Functions with no success (pretty sure is my bad).

Does someone can help me with a solution or suggestions?

Thanks in advance for your support,

Regards.

entry.title: How to pass multiple values in parameter for data action via scripting API
entry.content:
Hi,

Here is the scenario. There are three different model as Model A, Model B and Model C. Model A has dimension called Region and it has no hierarchy. Model B also has the same dimension as Region but has a parent child hierarchy. Model C has a dimension as Region and it has no hierarchy. Region dimension is private dimension across three different model.

My requirement is to read the values from Model A. Based on these values, I have to copy the data from Model B to Model C. Values that I read from Model A are always the leaf members of the hierarchy in Model B.

I have written the script logic to read the values from Model 'A' and even pass these values as parameters in the cross model copy data action to copy from Model 'B' to Model 'C' but I'm getting validation error message when I'm executing the script. Below is script logic I'm using in my story.

 

var A = Atable.getDataSource.getMembers("Region",100);

var key = Array.Utils.create(Type.String);

 for (var i = 0 ; i <A.length ; i++)

{

key.push(A[i].id);

}

DataAction.setParameterValue("Region",key);  //This line doesn't give me any error but I can see the validation issue on the data action job monitor. SAC is not exactly specifying the reason behind this validation error.

DataAction.setParameterValue("Region",["[Region].[H1].&["+ key[1]+"]" , "[Region].[H1].&["+ key[2]+"]" ]); // When I'm executing this script, it is working fine as I'm able to pass single/ multiple values using this syntax.

The highlighted script above is hard coded and it runs without any validation errors. Is there a way that I can pass multiple values for this parameter which has a hierarchy defined. Anyone who has faced this similar issue or knows the workaround in this case. Their comments would be deeply appreciated.

Thanks

entry.title: SAP BODS/IS upgrade from 4.2 SP14 to 4.3 SP03
entry.content:
Hi All,

We plan to upgrade the current BODS/IS+ BIP landscape from 4.2 SPXX to DS/IS 4.3 SP03 Patch 1 + BIP 4.3 SP4 Patch 8 on Linux OS.

After referring to many SAP documents and guides, we are planning to do an in-place Upgrade to 4.3  without uninstalling the older versions of any of the products(which we are not sure how it works). Has anyone worked on a similar set of approach? or any suggestions?.

Thank you in advance for your input.

entry.title: SAC Story can we have mutiple GL account hierarchy in Single Table -1
entry.content:
Can some one help on solution

Created Report on  Responsive Page . 

Inserted Table -1 in Table where we need GL account  hierarchy-1,GL account  hierarchy-2,GL account  hierarchy-3. as per below image ,we need to use 3 times Gl Account dimension in Table is it possible in single Table

entry.title: Changing Button Color on click and keeping the color till other button is clicked
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I have created a button that is currently in white color. This button serves as a filter, activating the filter when clicked.

My query is: If I click on the button, the button should be coloured, and it should remain coloured till another button is clicked. How can we achieve this in SAP SAC Optimized story?

entry.title: Can I See Private Versions Created by Other Users with a Standard License?
entry.content:
Dear,

I have a question about access rights for different roles. In our system, we have three roles:

  • Admin (Professional License)

  • Premium Role (Standard License)

  • Planner Role (Standard License with fewer rights than Premium)

As an Admin, I can see if private versions have been created by users with Premium or Planner roles. However, I’d like to know if a user with a Premium Role (Standard License) can also see private versions created by other users (Premium or Planner), or if this visibility is limited only to Admins.

Has anyone found a way to enable such access?

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Request for Script to Control Measure in SAP Analytics Cloud Table Using Range Slide
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I am currently working on an analytic application in SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC) using SAP BW live data. I would like to control a measure in a table using a range slider through scripting. Specifically, I want to dynamically filter the measure based on the values selected in the range slider.

Requirements:

Range Slider: I have a range slider component (RangeSlider_1) in my application.

Table: I have a table component (Table_1) that displays data from SAP BW.

Dynamic Filtering: The measure in the table should be filtered dynamically based on the range slider's values.

Request:

Could you please provide a script

entry.title: SAC story Row and column alignment issue
entry.content:
Hi All,

Created story on Responsive page  after adding Required  Dimensions, styles applied on Top Node, Top Node-1

when we try to change Hierarchy or Remove Filters ,  we notice Two issue

1. Extra columns or Rows available which is not Auto Aliened.

2. Styles changes when hier levels changes  which is not   Auto Aliened.

Below image for Ref

entry.title: Nested IF Statement Comparing Versions
entry.content:
Hi all,

I want to implement the following logic: Write a "1" to Measure = Mismatch_Indicator for every member in "Site" Dimenstion if sales are above zero in Version = Public.Z AND there are no sales in Version = Public.X. 

The idea is to flag this site.

The only difference on these two versions, is that in version Public.Z, Sales are placed on d/DIM1 = "#" and d/DIM2 = "#". Both are placed on a Site.

I have tried with the following script, however I don't get the desired output.

CONFIG.GENERATE_UNBOOKED_DATA = ON

//SCOPE
MEMBERSET [d/Measures] = "Mismatch_Indicator"
MEMBERSET [d/Date] = [d/Version].[p/From_Date] TO [d/Version].[p/To_Date]

//DATA WRITING

IF RESULTLOOKUP([d/Measures] = "Net_Sales_ext", [d/Version] = "public.Z", [d/DIM1] = "#", [d/DIM2] = "#") > 0 THEN
IF RESULTLOOKUP([d/Measures] = "Net_Sales_ext", [d/Version] = "public.X") = 0 THEN
DATA([d/Measures] = "Mismatch_Indicator") = 1
ENDIF
ENDIF

entry.title: SAC model replace (zero) with 0
entry.content:
Hello,

I want to replace in SAC in model records containing zero with 0. This works if I select the records in detail using parameters in a popup window. Is there a way to replace all records containing (zero) with 0 for a specific key figure without selecting the parameters per employee? (see Bild 1)

 

I need the “0” so that the average per employee is calculated correctly when changing cost centers.

Without “0”, the average per year per employee is calculated as follows:

I would be happy to hear your suggestions.

Thank You

BR

Marm
